Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance And Production To Plaintiff'S Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One; Declaration Of Corey Page In Support
Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF MARIA VILCHES BY AND THROUGH HER ATTORNEY-IN FACT AND SON FRANK VILCHES' Motion To Compel Compliance And Production To Plaintiff'S Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion to compel GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. Complete responses, without objections, due to be served no later than November 15, 2024, unless otherwise agreed by the parties. Sanctions GRANTED in the amount of $1,000, payable no later than November 15, 2024, unless otherwise agreed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and email to the Judge Pro Tem.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (525/JPT)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF MARIA VILCHES' MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for leave to amend complaint" is granted.
